title: Kapetanios gia... klamata
actors: Kostas Hatzihristos, Giorgos Kabanellis, Martha Karagianni
plot: A mildly inebriated second mate promises to marry an unknown woman; however, when he sobers up, he sends a jovial midshipman to get him off the hook, convinced that she is unattractive. But, what happens if she is truly ravishing ...
